## Zero-knowledge check

<!-- If this PR involves any server-side or networking code: -->
- [ ] This change does not introduce a path where Morrigan's servers can access plaintext user data
- [ ] No encryption keys are logged, stored server-side, or transmitted to Morrigan's infrastructure

- [ ] Tested in Firefox
